text:
I'm here to help you with your GEO audit results! Let's take a look at what you're seeing on the overview tab. Your overall GEO score is 69/100, which is a solid start! 

If you're facing specific issues or have questions about the recommendations or metrics, please let me know. We can work together to identify opportunities for improvement and make your site even more visible to AI agents. What specific concerns do you have?
